versions.title: Proposal — ACME

versions.proposal_html:
F
FRISTINE INFOTECH

Zoho Implementation Proposal For CCMS

Tata Steel
Manufacturing · Prepared by Fristine Infotech Presales Team
25 Mar 2026
Tata Steel
Fristine Infotech Presales
presales@fristinetech.com
1
About Fristine Infotech

Fristine Infotech is India's leading Premium Zoho Partner helping clients across markets, industries & geographies solve complex business problems through bespoke Zoho implementations.

Over 10 years and 200+ implementations across Marketing, Sales, Operations, Finance, and Support.

Our Key Clients:

eBayPepperfryEdelweissYES SecuritiesNPCIJioSuzlonMercedes-BenzTATA MDCARE Ratings
2
Executive Summary

Tata Steel intends to implement a unified Customer Complaint Management System (CCMS) on Zoho CRM Plus to digitise and streamline the end-to-end complaint lifecycle, starting from complaint intake (via Cares / Email / Manual) through investigation, approvals, settlement, returns, financial closure, and final customer communication.

FRD/Business Requirements at a glance:

  • Digital complaint intake with invoice/batch/quantity selection and evidence uploads.
  • Routing & ownership starting with PAG Tech Desk screening, followed by FRT investigation.
  • Parallel CAPA initiation with root cause analysis, countermeasures, and effectiveness tracking.
  • CIR (Complaint Investigation Report) creation with Delegation of Power (DOP) approvals.
  • Settlement pathways including No Claim, Salvage, and Return & Take Back.
  • SAP integration for invoice/batch data, GRN, and credit/debit memo creation.
  • Dashboards & analytics for operational, financial, quality and SLA metrics.
W
Implementation Workflow

The following workflow outlines how Fristine Infotech will implement the CCMS step-by-step:

StepWorkflowDescription
1Complaint IntakeDigital capturing via Cares/Email/Manual with SAP S/4HANA validation.
2PAG Tech Desk ScreeningValidation of batch/invoice and duplicate usage detection.
3FRT Field InvestigationOn-site investigation using defect-wise checklists.
4CIR & DOP ApprovalsComplaint Investigation Report generation and hierarchical approval thresholds.
5Material Return & SettlementSAP GRN synchronisation, salvage, and credit/debit note generation.
6CAPA & RecoveryRoot cause analysis, corrective actions, and recovery from liable parties.
3
Detailed Scope Of Work

Zoho CRM CCMS Configuration

Module / FeatureScope DescriptionPersona
Complaint TrackingDigital intake via TSL Cares, auto-ID, and SAP validation.Admin / Service
PAG Tech DeskInitial screening, batch validation, and routing workflows.PAG Admin
FRT InvestigationSite visit tracking, defect checklists, and Promise TAT.AE / PAG
CIR ProcessingRCA, liability determination, and DOP approval cycles.PAG / Finance
Material ReturnPickup coordination, Hub confirmation, and SAP GRN sync.Hub Manager
CAPA ManagementCorrective/Preventive actions and effectiveness tracking.QA / TG
Settlement & RecoveryClaim calculation, recovery tracking, and credit/debit memos.Finance / SM

Integrations & Support Modules

RequirementStatusPersona
SAP S/4HANA (API)Invoice, Batch, RE, GRN, and Credit/Debit Note sync.IT / Vendor
IPCA IntegrationInvestigation request trigger and report retrieval.IT / Vendor
Zoho Desk & SurveySLA escalations, notifications, and customer feedback.IT / Support
Zoho AnalyticsOperational, Financial, and Quality dashboards.MIS Team
SMS & WhatsAppTransactional alerts and status updates.IT / Admin
4
Project Governance & Plan

Timeline: Delivery within 140 Working days / 6.5 Calendar Months.

Escalation Matrix

LevelRoleResponse TAT
L1Delivery Lead6 Hours
L2Operation Manager2 Business Days
L3CTO4 Business Days
  • Governance: Requirement workshops, FSD sign-off, and weekly check-ins.
  • Change Control: All changes reviewed via Change Advisory Board (CAB).
5
Commercials

Implementation Efforts (Indicative)

#ParticularsTypeAmount (INR)
1Requirement Workshop & FSDT&M₹ (Quoted)
2Zoho CRM CCMS ImplementationProject₹ (Quoted)
3SAP & IPCA IntegrationsProject₹ (Quoted)
4Data Migration (Last 5 years)T&M₹ (Quoted)
5UAT, Training & Hyper-careProject₹ (Included)
Implementation Total₹ (Quoted)

Managed Services (Platinum Plan)

  • 80 hrs/mo Support | 16x6 Coverage | 1hr Response SLA | L1–L3 Support
Monthly Run Fee₹ (Quoted)

Taxes: The above pricing is exclusive of GST. Zoho License costs are not included and must be paid in full upfront.

6
